summary: Matched two stage functions, grOldPupupu_80211110 and grRCruise_80201B60, replacing nonmatching placeholders with C bodies and updating the grRCruise header prototype. The bot report records both functions moving from 0.00% to 100.00%, for +252 matched bytes.

key_files.role: Replaced the grOldPupupu_80211110 placeholder with a matched body and added the gr/grmaterial.h include.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grOldPupupu_80211110 0.00% to 100.00%, +124 bytes

key_files.role: Replaced the grRCruise_80201B60 placeholder with a matched body and added the sysdolphin baselib dobj include.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists grRCruise_80201B60 0.00% to 100.00%, +128 bytes

key_files.role: Updated the grRCruise_80201B60 declaration from unknown return/params to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grRCruise_80201B60 prototype changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(HSD_JObj*, s32)

what_changed.text: Implemented grOldPupupu_80211110 in groldpupupu.c using Ground_GObj user_data and hsd_obj, grAnime_801C8138, grMaterial_801C8858, and Ground flag fields.
Implemented grRCruise_80201B60 in grrcruise.c as a loop over HSD_DObj objects from HSD_JObjGetDObj, toggling flag 1 with HSD_DObjClearFlags or HSD_DObjSetFlags based on arg1.
Updated grRCruise_80201B60's public prototype in grrcruise.h to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32).
Added includes required by the new calls/types: gr/grmaterial.h in groldpupupu.c and <sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.h> in grrcruise.c.

smart_moves.text: The grRCruise header was updated when the function body established a concrete signature, avoiding a stale UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declaration.
The grRCruise match used existing HSD_DObj/HSD_JObj helper APIs rather than raw object pointer arithmetic.
The grOldPupupu match accessed known Ground and HSD_JObj fields through typed locals for the main operations.

decomp_lessons.text: When a recovered stage function proves its signature, update the owning stage header in the same PR rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS behind.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grrcruise.h prototype changed to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32)

decomp_lessons.text: For DObj traversal under a JObj, existing baselib helpers HSD_JObjGetDObj, HSD_DObjClearFlags, and HSD_DObjSetFlags can express the operation directly and supported a 100% match in this PR.
Stage init/setup-style functions may need small, function-local includes for material or baselib APIs once generated placeholders are replaced.

naming_conventions.text: Local names in these matches follow short role names: gobj for Ground_GObj*, gp for Ground*, jobj for HSD_JObj*, dobj for HSD_DObj*, and next for the next DObj link.
Unproven parameter semantics remained generic as arg1 in grRCruise_80201B60 rather than inventing a semantic name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj* jobj, s32 arg1)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used PAD_STACK(16) in grOldPupupu_80211110 and PAD_STACK(8) in grRCruise_80201B60.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: PR body says all 100% matched
text_corpus: bot report lists both functions at 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: grRCruise_80201B60 uses a while loop over the HSD_DObj linked list and stores dobj->next in a separate next local before advancing.

grRCruise_80201B60 preserves an explicit inner null check before reading dobj->next even though the loop condition already checks dobj != NULL; this appears in the matched body and should be treated as match-shape evidence, not a general style rule.
grOldPupupu_80211110 keeps both a Ground* local gp and a repeated cast from gobj->user_data for the x10_flags write, indicating source-shape sensitivity for the match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grOldPupupu_80211110 gp local and ((Ground*) gobj->user_data)->x10_flags.b2

follow_up_queries: stage header UNK_RET UNK_PARAMS HSD_JObj s32

text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists 2 new matches and +252 matched bytes
raw_diff: complete diff for all 3 changed files

notes: No review comments or human review discussion were present in the loaded slice, so reviewer intent and review feedback are not inferred.
The PR body and bot report support the 100% match claim, but no raw objdiff output or local build log was included beyond the bot summary.
PAD_STACK usage is recorded as a matching tactic used in this PR, not as an accepted general style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update stage header prototypes when matched bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2270 replaced grRCruise_80201B60's UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declaration with void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32) in the owning stage header alongside the matched body.

accepted_candidate_records.title: DObj linked-list flag toggling match shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2270 matched grRCruise_80201B60 using HSD_JObjGetDObj, a while loop over HSD_DObj->next, and HSD_DObjClearFlags/HSD_DObjSetFlags based on a nonzero s32 parameter.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK(8) or PAD_STACK(16) as a general recommendation from this PR alone; the standards require narrow evidence and this slice only shows that the tactic appeared in matched functions.
Do not infer semantic meaning for arg1 in grRCruise_80201B60; the PR leaves the parameter generic.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; the loaded slice has no review comments.
